name: Klaviyo

auth.notes: Private API keys are scoped and used for server-side API access. Remote MCP requires a Klaviyo account with sufficient workspace role.

rateLimits: Use current Klaviyo endpoint-specific rate limit headers and API documentation.
notes: Klaviyo has one of the strongest agent surfaces in the GTM stack: official MCP, CLI, API reference, SDKs, and OpenAPI assets.
Local MCP can be run with uvx and supports read-only controls for safer agent usage.
Remote MCP access depends on Klaviyo account permissions.
